notes: Hybrid root+body fishing clips for Moonwell. Install https://github.com/nv-tlabs/ardy + HF Llama access for full CUDA ARDY.generate; current bake note: ardy + cuda available via .venv-ardy (clip adapter; full generate needs HF Llama-3-8B)

clips.prompt: angler stands ready at the moonwell rim
angler draws back and casts fishing rod toward moonlit water
angler waits patiently with rod tip over the well
angler strikes hard when the bobber dips
angler reels smoothly keeping tension in the green zone
angler fights a thrashing fish on the line
